<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/collection library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Collection; /** * Collection sorting */ enum Sort: string { /** * Sort items in a collection in ascending order. */ case Ascending = 'asc'; /** * Sort items in a collection in descending order. */ case Descending = 'desc'; }
